posts.raw_content:
It’s like talking to a child.

> I think killing people is bad, and stuff. I also think it’s, like, bad when people die. Therefore I have come to the conclusion that WAR IS BAD. We should have NO WARS. I am very smart!

As if there is just a “no war” button on every Presidents’ desk and only the EVIL ones won’t press it. 

> what about MUH MILITARY INDUSTRIAL COMPLEX

Every midwit talks about MUH MILITARY INDUSTRIAL COMPLEX. It sounds like an advanced idea because it has a fancy little name.

Really it is just a stupid way of saying that you need to build stuff for wars, and the people building the stuff will want to build more stuff.

> people, like, make money from war man!!

OMG that is so deep bro. I remember when I was a 14 year old stoner too. I guess we should never have another war ever because people make money.

The average user here is a total and complete retard on the subject of war. They see Trump killing an Iranian terrorist on any given day and their response is:

> omg it is all so tiresome!

Tiresome? You sound like a faggot or a woman. Trump is killing America’s enemies, doing work that is critical, and your actual response is “this is tiresome” like some bitch wife complaining about your husband not doing the dishes.

War is not easily avoidable. It’s a complex topic best left to generals who actually study and contemplate the history, politics, and warfare. The decision to stop iran from getting a nuclear weapon was a sound one. Imagining we had some great other option is delusional. Bitching abut gas prices is pathetic. 

Trump has done a fine job commanding our military and you absolute retards and MUSLIM CUCKS need to stfu.
